title: SOC 2 — reference control themes (Tron built-in, not an attestation)
disclaimer: Structured hints for code review only. This is not a CPA report or SOC 2 examination.

themes.summary: Logical and physical access controls — authentication, authorization, session handling in application code.
System monitoring — logging, alerting, tamper-evidence for security-relevant events.
Change management — safe deployment, configuration drift, secrets in source control.
